subtitle: Senior Technology & Transformation Leader -- Portfolio Governance | Cross-Functional PMO | Executive Stakeholder Engagement
summary_text: Senior technology and transformation leader with 14 years building and running an enterprise transformation portfolio at Money Management International -- a national 501(c)(3) financial services nonprofit operating under continuous regulatory scrutiny across all 50 states plus federal regulators (HIPAA, PCI-DSS, CARD Act, CFPB). Built MMI's Enterprise PMO from scratch and operated the multi-factor prioritization model (ROI x user satisfaction x efficiency x cross-departmental equity) governing sprint-over-sprint decisions across 12+ executive and operations stakeholders and a 45-50 person delivery organization. Currently consulting on AI architecture, automation, and implementation -- including a structured evaluation methodology adopted by a national CX consulting firm. Comfortable owning a transformation portfolio through influence rather than line authority -- consensus, earned-veto, and explicit governance frameworks have been the operating model throughout.

bullets: Designed an algorithmic AI architecture evaluation framework -- scoring rubric, capability taxonomy, evaluation flow -- adopted by a national CX consulting firm to inform investment and vendor-selection decisions across enterprise AI platforms.

Provide client-facing transformation methodology advisory on generative and agentic AI architectures, automation, and implementation; translate executive priorities into architectural trade-offs and concrete platform decisions.
Hands-on AI-assisted engineering daily with Claude and GitHub Copilot; published thinking on AI adoption realities, the automation-vs-AI distinction, and reflexive AI governance practice on LinkedIn.

Directed enterprise technology for a national 501(c)(3) regulated financial services nonprofit -- under continuous audit across all 50 states plus federal regulators including the CFPB, with HIPAA, PCI-DSS, and CARD Act overlays. Comparable regulatory surface to wealth management and broker-dealer firms.

Built Enterprise PMO from scratch; consolidated cross-functional project governance across IT and non-IT functions; delivered 25% improvement in project budget and time adherence across a $30-50M annual portfolio.

Owned multi-year transformation portfolio for MMI's homegrown ERP/CRM platform for 8 years; multi-factor prioritization model (ROI x user satisfaction x efficiency x cross-departmental equity) governed sprint-over-sprint decisions across 12+ executive and operations stakeholders and a 45-50 person delivery organization.
Led 4-5 board engagements per year over 8-year CTO tenure -- presenting major transformation initiatives, financial forecasting, and risk posture to non-technical executive audiences.

Led full enterprise contact center AI transformation -- intelligent routing, AI-assisted coaching and monitoring, integrated knowledge bots -- with zero service disruption on day-one go-live; build-buy-partner architecture across enterprise CC + specialized AI vendors.
Modernized SDLC through Agile transformation (SAFe 10-week to 2-week sprints); doubled development throughput and reduced concept-to-deployment timelines by up to 20% YoY.

Spearheaded multi-year cloud-first transformation; migrated all enterprise workloads to Azure; sustained 100% PCI-DSS certification across multiple audit cycles alongside HIPAA and CARD Act compliance.
Built and led a 35+ direct (75+ extended) technology team; sustained highest retention and satisfaction in the enterprise across 14 years.

Founded and ran a web development and IT consulting firm for 17 years -- full P&L ownership; delivered custom digital solutions for dozens of clients across content-driven and transactional verticals.
Architected and operated a proprietary commercial-grade CMS supporting dozens of production sites; direct client engagement across discovery, scope, architecture, build, and ongoing support.

skills.items: Enterprise PMO Governance, Multi-Year Roadmap, Multi-Factor Prioritization, Operating Model Design, KPI Architecture, Process Re-Engineering
Board-Level Communication, 12+ Executive Stakeholder Governance, Cross-Functional Influence, Consensus / Earned-Veto Operating Model
Generative AI, Agentic AI, AI Architecture Evaluation, LLM Platforms, Build-Buy-Partner Strategy
Microsoft Azure, Azure DevOps, GitHub, Cloud Migration, Agile/SAFe, SDLC Modernization
PCI-DSS, HIPAA, CARD Act, CFPB, Multi-State Regulatory, GRC Programs
DataRobot (Production ML), Power BI, Tableau, SQL/T-SQL, Data Governance
